title: The Cordyceps Fungus
description: The World Has Changed - The Cordyceps fungus is spreading and consuming the world. Defend - Fight  - Adapt!
body:
![The cordyceps fungus banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/477e7b00759d41f341cb5e0cefd2d9768eff8e49.webp) **
Conquer The Cordyceps Fungus | Ultimate Apocalypse Experience
** ## 💡 About ### No Turning Back The infection has irreversibly claimed the world. Its spread is unstoppable, constantly evolving and adapting to every environment. You are forced to coexist with it, powerless to halt its advance. ![infected world picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7647737d0427cdaf8bba83e01efdd1009998cacd_0.webp) ### Defense Is Crucial With no means of stopping the infection, your only hope for survival lies in defense. Start with simple spikes, upgrade to barbed wire, and eventually deploy powerful cannons to fortify your position. ![defending castle picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78a1ba009cd2a7d4fb6b6221aacac02a34e01e40.webp) ### Investigate Infected Structures These ominous structures may hold secrets about the infection's origin. Explore them at your peril, but be warned: infected entities may still lurk within. ![infected structure picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49072b8f7ec49625f44f64324e8f97cdc9853a4c.webp) ### Adapt and Conquer The infected are vulnerable to cold, making colder regions a strategic advantage. Craft powerful bio-weapons from their remains. ![frozen environment picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c393491c30163bd8e4d48465908b87f603aea32_0.webp) # ### 🌼 Features - 🍄 **Fully Fledged Cordyceps Fungus** -> Infected Mobs Evolve Over Time. Mounds spread the infection through ground. Craft Living Armor and Tools - 🔥 **Realistic Fire** -> Fire function like in real life. Spreads faster and is more destructive. You cannot ignore it. - ⚖️ **Balanced Gameplay** -> No TACZ, It's awesome mod but too much OP. Balanced Guns. balanced loot from structures. - 🌱 **Beginner Friendly** -> No over complicated mod included. look for recipes in EMI(JEI/just enough item). Play at your pace, explore, build, survive. - ✨ **Lightweight And Beautiful Graphics** -> Performance is our priority. Shaders included. Overhauled clouds&fog when shaders disabled. - ⚔️ Overhauled Combat - ✈️ Immersive Aircraft - ⚙️ Custom Mob Spawning Rules # ### ⚠️ Can my PC handle this modpack? Yes! We crafted this modpack to be light weight and optimized. To get even more performance you can try these things: - Disable Shaders: Options -> Video Settings -> Oculus -> Shaders: Disabled - Lower Render Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Render distance - Lower Simulation Distance: Options -> Video settings -> Simulation distance - Allocate More Ram: Look at Tutorial from [Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/clients/index.php?rp=/knowledgebase/1866/How-to-allocate-more-ram-on-modded-Minecraft-launchers.html), We recommend 4-6gb - Update All your drivers # # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host! Setting up a server through them is the absolute best way to support us right now. Don't just take our word for it—read the community reviews here: [Best Minecraft Server Hosting.](https://www.reddit.com/r/MinecraftServer/comments/1i1zl4s/best_minecraft_server_hosting/) 👉 Click the image below or use this link: [Godlike Host](https://affiliate.godlike.host/jessdX) to get 50% off your first month! # ### 📒 Credits - Inspired by [The Fungal Infection](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-fungal-infection-coop) - Art by Ash.
